  "weights": {

    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,

  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering higher-level structure or content.",
    "RX.1": "Maintain appropriate qualifiers and preliminary language in the results so that uncertainty is preserved during polishing.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid strengthening claims or implying broader effectiveness than the reported results support while refining language.",
    "RX.3": "Constrain changes strictly to writing polish and do not introduce reorganization, new analyses, or content changes.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure no edits could mislead about performance or efficiency, preserving cautions and not fabricating or omitting details.",
    "RX.5": "Retain all reported numbers, datasets, and baseline references exactly as given to preserve traceability to the original text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering higher-level structure or content.
rationale.RX.1: Maintain appropriate qualifiers and preliminary language in the results so that uncertainty is preserved during polishing.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid strengthening claims or implying broader effectiveness than the reported results support while refining language.
rationale.RX.3: Constrain changes strictly to writing polish and do not introduce reorganization, new analyses, or content changes.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure no edits could mislead about performance or efficiency, preserving cautions and not fabricating or omitting details.
rationale.RX.5: Retain all reported numbers, datasets, and baseline references exactly as given to preserve traceability to the original text.
